mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO, pvi.CONTENT AS PARENT_MENU_NAME,
p.PARAM_NO, p.CPNY_ID AS PARAM_CPNY_ID, p.ORDERNO AS PARAM_ORDER_NO, p.ACTIVITY AS PARAM_ACTIVITY, p.IS_CAN_BE_BUILD, CASE WHEN p.PARAM_NO IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_ASSIGNED FROM SY_MENU m LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON m.MENU_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON m.MENU_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON m.MENU_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON m.MENU_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME pvi ON m.MENU_PARENT_NO = pvi.NO AND pvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi'
LEFT JOIN SY_MENU_PARAM p ON m.MENU_NO = p.MENU_NO AND p.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
WHERE m.ACTIVITY = 1
AND m.MENU_PARENT_NO = #{parentMenuNo}
AND (m.MENU_PARENT_NO IS NULL OR m.MENU_PARENT_NO = '')
ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO
SELECT * FROM SY_MENU_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND MENU_NO = #{menuNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_MENU_PARAM SET IS_CAN_BE_BUILD = #{isCanBeBuild}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity} WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SY_MENU_PARAM WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND MENU_NO = #{menuNo}
